1:1307.name: In most digital products, engagement is everything. In clinical research, engagement must not distort behaviour. We tested common engagement techniques — progress rings, streaks, compliance scores — and rejected them all. They introduced emotional pressure, reward-seeking, or bias that could compromise data integrity. Instead, we practiced invisible encouragement. After completing a task or training, users receive a small, passive badge — no sound, no distracting animation, no complex interaction. Just a quiet signal of closure: thank you, you’re done!

After completing a task or training, users receive a small, passive badge — no sound, no distracting animation, no complex interaction. Just a quiet signal of closure: thank you, you’re done!

1:1100.name: Consultants relied on a fragmented ecosystem of disconnected tools, forcing manual data bridging and slowing decisions across complex, multi-client engagements.
1:1100.characters: Consultants relied on a fragmented ecosystem of disconnected tools, forcing manual data bridging and slowing decisions across complex, multi-client engagements.

1:1257.name: Procurement consultants often spent more time navigating the tools than acting on insights. Our task was to consolidate data and workflows into a unified platform without disrupting active global projects. This meant balancing innovation with operational stability. Every new pattern had to integrate with existing databases, align with security and compliance requirements, and remain adaptable to evolving users needs.

1:1249.name: Procurement is a high-stakes discipline built on the intersection of human relationships and data precision. At Efficio, the world’s leading procurement consultancy, the challenge was to move beyond simple digitization toward true architectural unity. The Connected Platform was designed as the firm’s central nervous system: a modern, intelligent ecosystem connecting consultants, clients, and millions of data points through a single, cohesive interface.
